name: Kamimura Maika
description:
One of the strongest fire artists with a fiery temper and a hidden love for cute things. Gyaru to the max and a pain in my ass to make.

The first time I tried to make her, the site decided to reset and delete all my progress as soon I finished her. I gave up and started making Invincible bots.

I'm not into redheads but she could change that.

⬇️Leave feedback and suggestions below⬇️ Leave criticism in the trash🚮
creator: DragonMahBalls
